scripts.next:dev: cross-env NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 HTTP_PROXY=http://wwwgate.ti.com:80 HTTPS_PROXY=http://wwwgate.ti.com:80 NO_PROXY=localhost:3000,127.0.0.1,ti.com,www.ti.com next dev -p 3000
scripts.next:dev-ssl: cross-env NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 HTTP_PROXY=http://wwwgate.ti.com:80 HTTPS_PROXY=http://wwwgate.ti.com:80 NO_PROXY=localhost:3000,127.0.0.1,ti.com,www.ti.com next dev -p 3000 --experimental-https
scripts.next:build: cross-env NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 HTTP_PROXY=http://wwwgate.ti.com:80 HTTPS_PROXY=http://wwwgate.ti.com:80 NO_PROXY=localhost:3000,127.0.0.1,ti.com,www.ti.com next build
scripts.dev: npm run bootstrap && npm run next:dev
scripts.dev-noproxy: npm run bootstrap && npm run next:dev-noproxy
scripts.dev-ssl: npm run bootstrap && npm run next:dev-ssl
scripts.build: npm run bootstrap && npm run next:build
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 HTTP_PROXY=http://wwwgate.ti.com:80 HTTPS_PROXY=http://wwwgate.ti.com:80 NO_PROXY=localhost:3000,127.0.0.1,ti.com,www.ti.com next start
scripts.figma-tokens: npm run internal-figma-tokens && npm run theme-config
scripts.update-snapshots: cross-env TZ=Etc/UTC GENERATE_ALL_BRAND_STYLES=true NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_SITE_NAME=WhiteLabel npm run bootstrap && npm run test:update
scripts.test: cross-env TZ=Etc/UTC GENERATE_ALL_BRAND_STYLES=true NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_SITE_NAME=WhiteLabel npm run bootstrap && npm run jest
